name: Oatcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and butter together until smooth.
2. Mix in the dry ingredients (oats, salt, and flour) until well combined.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Roll out the mixture to about 1/2-inch thickness on a floured surface.
5. Cut into desired shapes using sharp knife or cookie cutter.
6. Place the oatcake pieces on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake at 325°F (160°C) for 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
